_meta.notes: Centralized copy for PUBLIC pages (Board + Job + Apply flow) and default outbound emails. Avoid recruiter/dashboard strings unless they are part of an email template.

board.heroSubtitle: Boutique fintech consultancy at the intersection of data, distributed ledger technology (cacota), and payments.
board.noMatches: No positions match the selected filters.

job.receivedBody: Thank you for applying. We’ll be in contact soon.

placeholders.cvTap: Tap to attach your CV (PDF only)

validation.emailInvalid: Please enter a valid email address.
validation.linkInvalid: Please enter a valid URL (including https://).
validation.consentRequired: Consent is required to submit your application.
validation.alreadyApplied: It looks like you already applied for this position with this email address.
validation.submitFailed: Couldn’t submit right now. Please try again.

legal.consentLabelPrefix: I consent to the processing of my personal data for recruitment purposes, in accordance with the

contact._where: Used by recruiter action to invite applicant to continue. Sent by backend via POST /applicants/{id}/contact.
contact.subject: Laminar Careers — Next steps
contact.body:
Hi {name},

Thank you for applying for {job_title}. We would like to invite you to continue the process.

Book your Interview
{booking_link}

Best regards,
Laminar Careers

rejection._where: Default rejection subject/body when this job has no custom values saved. Per-job overrides are stored on the job record. Sent when status becomes rejected.
rejection.subject: Laminar Careers
rejection.body:
Hi {name},

Thank you for applying. After reviewing your application, we will not be moving forward at this time.

We appreciate your interest and encourage you to apply for future openings.

Best regards,
Laminar Careers
